Home / Services / Logos, Graphics & Branding / Brand Kit

💎 Brand Kit

Go beyond just a logo — get a complete brand identity system that makes your business look established and professional across every touchpoint. Your brand kit includes a full logo suite (primary, secondary, icon, monochrome), a carefully curated colour palette with hex codes and usage rules, typography pairings for headings and body text, a comprehensive brand guidelines document, stationery designs (business card, letterhead, email signature), and a set of branded social media templates. Everything you need to present a consistent, premium image everywhere.

Service Details

Category: Logos, Graphics & Branding

Credits Price: 320 credits (approx. £400)

Turnaround: 7–12 days

How to Book

  1. Create a free account
  2. Purchase credits or subscribe to a plan
  3. Select this service and submit your brief
  4. Receive your completed project within 7–12 days
Book Brand Kit Now

Related Logos, Graphics & Branding Services

  • Logo Design — Custom logo design with multiple concepts, revisions, and complete brand-ready file package. (120 credits)
  • Social Media Graphics — Eye-catching social media post designs, stories, and cover images for all platforms. (80 credits)

Why Choose Creative Kaygency for Brand Kit?

  • Professional quality at credit-friendly prices
  • Fast turnaround: 7–12 days
  • Satisfaction guarantee with included revisions
  • Track progress from your personal dashboard
  • Save up to 20% by paying with credits
